results.title: Arbonne International - Wikipedia
results.content: # Arbonne International. **Arbonne International**, **LLC**, known as Arbonne, is an American multi-level marketing company founded in 1980 in the United States by Norwegian entrepreneur Petter Mørck. Arbonne is headquartered in Irvine, California, US, with US offices in Chatsworth, California, Greenwood, Indiana, Addison, Texas, and international offices in Australia, Canada, New Zealand, Poland, and the United Kingdom. Founded in Orem, Utah, United States by Mørck in 1980, Arbonne is named after the Swiss village of Arbon. In February 2018, Groupe Rocher, Paris "Yves Rocher (company)"), agreed to acquire Arbonne International and Nature's Gate from Natural Products Group. Between 2007 and 2009, the number of the company's consultants fell from 1.3 million to under 800,000. In 2006, Arbonne opened for business in Canada, then Australia in 2007, and the United Kingdom in 2008. In 2014, the company launched Arbonne Poland, and then New Zealand in 2016. In March 2018, Arbonne was acquired by Groupe Rocher "Yves Rocher (company)"). American multi-level marketing company.

results.title: H - Wikipedia
results.content: # H. Eighth letter of the Latin alphabet. Not to be confused with the Greek letter Η, the Cyrillic letters Н or Һ, or the planetary symbol ♄. **H** (minuscule: **h**) is the eighth letter "Letter (alphabet)") of the Latin alphabet, used in the modern English alphabet, including the alphabets of other Western European languages and others worldwide. The pronunciation /heɪtʃ/ may be a hypercorrection formed by analogy with the names of the other letters of the alphabet, most of which include the sound they represent. The *Oxford English Dictionary* says the original name of the letter was  in Latin; this became  in Vulgar Latin, passed into English via Old French , and by Middle English was pronounced . Anatoly Liberman suggests a conflation of two obsolete orderings of the alphabet, one with *H* immediately followed by *K* and the other without any *K*: reciting the former's *..., H, K, L,...* as [...(h)a ka el ...] when reinterpreted for the latter *..., H, L,...* would imply a pronunciation of [(h)a ka] for *H*.

results.title: H Definition & Meaning | Dictionary.com
results.content: the eighth letter of the English alphabet, a consonant. # h. #### Noun Inflected Forms. 2. any spoken sound represented by the letter *H* or *h,* as in *hot* or *behave.*. 3. something having the shape of an H . 4. a written or printed representation of the letter *H* or *h.*. 5. a device, as a printer's type, for reproducing the letter *H* or *h.*. 1. the eighth in order or in a series. 2. horizontal component of the earth's magnetic field. 6. *Music.* the letter used in German to indicate the tone B. 1. (in prescriptions) an hour. 1. the eighth letter and sixth consonant of the modern English alphabet. 2. a speech sound represented by this letter, in English usually a voiceless glottal fricative, as in *hat*. something shaped like an H. ### Origin of H. > At the beginning of a word, the letter **h** is never followed by a consonant. > From Seattle Times • Feb. 2, 2023.

results.content: ## Real estate success isn't *just* about getting licensed, it's the work you put in afterward that matters. AgentEDU® is built for real-world success, helping agents generate leads, close deals, and scale their business with confidence. Whether you're a new agent trying to gain traction, an experienced agent ready to level up, a team leader building systems or a broker looking to train agents at scale, AgentEDU® gives you a clear path forward. Learn the foundational skills of real estate in this course designed for newly-licensed agents. Learn the how to expertly represent home buyers in this course designed for newly-licensed agents. Learn the how to expertly represent sellers in this course designed for newly-licensed agents. In this course, learn how to use real estate advertising, generate leads and get them converting. In this course series, learn how to negotiate like a pro for buyers and sellers alike. In this course, learn everything on how to make open houses work for you and your real estate business.

We oversee design, permitting, financing, and construction — ensuring projects are delivered efficiently and positioned for success. Our market knowledge, marketing strategies, and negotiation skills help space get leased quickly and at competitive terms. ### Advisory & Asset Strategy. Real estate is more than bricks and mortar — it’s a business strategy. We provide portfolio planning, capital markets advisory, and long-term asset positioning to help you align your real estate with financial goals. Our management platform safeguards your asset’s value and tenant relationships. We handle the day-to-day so you can focus on scaling your portfolio. We’re here to help! Fill out the form below or reach out directly using the provided details, and we’ll get back to you promptly.

results.content:
Overview:
Agence Centrale, est à la fois une agence immobilière, un syndic de copropriété et un administrateur de biens implantée dans le centre de Lyon. Depuis plus de 50 ans, notre équipe met toutes ses compétences à votre service pour gérer votre bien dans les meilleures conditions, que vous soyez propriétaire, copropriétaire, locataire ou que vous soyez à la recherche d’un bien immobilier.

results.title: Building Industry Partners
results.content: # Our Purpose is to build exceptional and enduring businesses, generate world-class investment returns, and contribute to elevating the building industry and its workforce through people-focused investment and business principles. Building Industry Partners (“BIP”) is a leading investment firm focused on the U.S. building industry. We are proud to have been a part of creating some of the industry’s fastest-growing and most dynamic businesses of the past decade. From our very beginnings, we have focused on partnering with and supporting the entrepreneurial visions of the building industry’s best and brightest business leaders, as well as bringing to fruition the goals that owners have for the well-being of their employees and the continuation of their family’s legacy. We believe that businesses perform best when the interests of investors and employers are aligned with the interests of employees. Our team works with each of our portfolio companies to implement Human Capital Management programs that are designed to accelerate performance by aligning the company’s employee value proposition with equity value creation strategies.

results.title: What is a NP?
results.content: An NP (Nurse Practitioner) is your partner in health providing high-quality primary, acute and specialty healthcare services similar to those of a physician.Read more

results.title: NP - Definition, Meaning & Synonyms
results.content: a registered nurse who has received special training and can perform many of the duties of a physician. synonyms: nurse clinician, nurse practitioner.Read more

results.title: What Is a Nurse Practitioner? What They Do, When to See One, and What to Expect
results.content: A nurse practitioner (NP) is a health care professional who offers a wide range of acute, primary, and specialty care services, either alone or alongside a doctor. The services a nurse practitioner can provide depend on the state in which they practice. In many states, NPs are licensed to be fully independent practitioners who can prescribe medications and do certain procedures without supervision by a doctor. As primary care doctors leave the profession faster than they can be replaced, especially in rural areas, nurse practitioners can play a larger role as primary care providers. A nurse practitioner is not a medical doctor, although some NPs may have a doctorate degree. Licensing can vary state by state, and there can be a lot of overlap in the roles of NPs and doctors, but nurse practitioners focus on preventing diseases and promoting the health and well-being of the whole person. Nurse practitioners have a wide scope of practice, although they may be allowed to do more things in certain states.

results.title: Nurse practitioner (NP) : MedlinePlus Medical Encyclopedia
results.content: An official website of the United States government. A **.gov** website belongs to an official government organization in the United States. A **lock** (  ) or **https://** means you’ve safely connected to the .gov website. A nurse practitioner (NP) is a nurse with a graduate degree in advanced practice nursing. This type of provider may also be referred to as an ARNP (Advanced Registered Nurse Practitioner) or APRN (Advanced Practice Registered Nurse). The NP is allowed to provide a broad range of health care services, which may include:. Their range of health care services (scope of practice) and privileges (authority granted to a provider) depends on laws in the state in which they work. Today, more states are requiring NPs to have a master's or doctorate degree and national certification. Some NPs may use the credential ARNP, which means advanced registered nurse practitioner. They may also use the credential APRN, which means advanced practice registered nurse.

results.title: Homepage
results.content: ##### DIFLORIO FINANCIAL. ###### Marco Diflorio. Do you have enough money to retire on? No matter your goals and dreams for retirement, making them happen means having a reliable stream of income. Fortunately, you can have a financial professional by your side to help. We’ll evaluate your financial situation, assess the current economic landscape and recommend a strategy that gives you the freedom and stability to maintain your lifestyle, pursue your goals, and concentrate on living the lifestyle you desire. We have interesting videos for you to watch on my site. You can review interesting calculators on my site. Money is personal, and emotional, but it doesn’t have to be scary. Understanding how your day-to-day finances and your emotions are connected can help you take more control of your financial situation. Whether you have a "surprise fund" already or not, these easy steps can help you feel secure and prepared for any future surprise expenses. Budgeting doesn’t have to be a scary word.

results.title: Aperçu de l'entreprise Infobel
results.content: Infobel est une entreprise mondiale de données d'emplacement de premier plan, qui fournit une qualité élevée de données globales, locales et contextuelles

results.title: Infobel - Wikipedia
results.content: # Infobel. **Infobel** (Infobel S.A.) is a Brussels-based data intelligence company originally founded in 1995 as one of the first online international telephone directories. Over the years, the company evolved into a global provider of business-to-business and location intelligence data. Through its platform, Infobel has developed one of the largest existing databases of verified business profiles and points of interest, serving businesses of all sizes across use cases such as marketing, sales, compliance, and location intelligence. In 2025, the company was acquired by Datasharp, a holding led by Antoine Bruyns (chief executive officer) and Didier Baclin (chief technology officer), with investment support from Strada Partners. Under the new leadership, Infobel is scaling internationally and expanding its role in the global data ecosystem. In 2025, Infobel was acquired by Datasharp a holding company led by entrepreneurs Antoine Bruyns (chief executive officer) and Didier Baclin (chief technology officer) - with strategic support from the investment firm Strada Partners].

results.title: Renan Bressan - Wikipedia
results.content: # Renan Bressan. | Bressan with BATE Borisov in 2012. On 28 January 2010, Bressan signed with BATE Borisov. He scored 15 goals during his first season with BATE, becoming the top scorer in the Belarusian Premier League for the 2010 season. On 2 October 2012, Bressan scored BATE's third goal in their 3–1 shock defeat of Bayern Munich in the second game of the Champions League group stage. In late November 2012, Russian Premier League club Alania Vladikavkaz acquired the services of Bressan. Bressan went on to sign a two-year contract with FC Astana on the 10th, but was released from his contract on 12 July after only 7 games for the club. During the football tournament of the 2012 Summer Olympics he was one of three overage players selected by the Belarusian federation and scored the only goal for Belarus U23 in a 3–1 loss against the country he was born in – Brazil.
